programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders restore a timber frame home on a frozen field in West Virginia; Mark and Johnny visit an extraordinary mountain top retreat with a log home and timber frame pool house; Alex Webb builds a lord's table and bench at his workshop.

programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: The Barnwood Builders have a whole lot of fun in Abingdon, Va, while saving an old barn, the guys explore the local history as they work with a master craftsman, operate an old sawmill, explore a restored cabin, and even drive an antique tractor.

programs.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programs.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Married for 16 years with two children, Mike and Linda are looking for a lakefront property to call a family home; they are real estate investors and are looking for a property that is a good investment.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Active retirees Shirley and Chris are having their adult children and grandchildren move back home; they are looking for a large lakefront home for their entire family to live together all under one roof.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: James, Cristina and their children pack up and leave city life behind; they find a modern home with resort-inspired outdoor space, including a pool with a swim-up bar, as well as an elegant heritage home with a cobblestone driveway.
